not_visible.subtext: Departments not currently visible to users

delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this educational department? This action cannot be undone.

add.description: Create a new educational department that can be used within the application data.

view.title: View Educational Department Details
view.description: Here you can view the details of the educational department.

edit.title: Edit Educational Department
